Class ChatApp

java.lang.Object
chat.app.ChatApp
All Implemented Interfaces:
ChatView
public class ChatApp extends Object implements ChatView
Swing-based reference UI for the simple chat application.

This class builds a minimal messenger-like UI and delegates all networking and protocol handling to ChatClient. It implements ChatView to receive events from the client. All UI updates occur on the Swing Event Dispatch Thread.

    Shows an informational/system message that does not originate from a user.

    Provides the current list of users connected to the server.

      Description copied from interface: ChatView
      Notifies that the client has successfully connected and logged in.

      Parameters:

    • onPublicMessage

      Delivers a public message that was broadcast to everyone.

      Parameters:

      text - message text

      public void onPrivateMessage(String from, String to, String text)

      Delivers a private (direct) message.

      Parameters:
      from - sender nickname
      to - recipient nickname
      text - message text

    • onUsers

      public void onUsers(List<String> users)
      Description copied from interface: ChatView
      Provides the current list of users connected to the server.
      Specified by:
      onUsers in interface ChatView
      Parameters:
      users - list of nicknames (may be empty but never null)

      Shows an informational/system message that does not originate from a user.

      Parameters:
      text - human-readable message
